title: helichrysum oligocephalum
intro: Helichrysum oligocephalum, also known as the 'Ma'o hau hele,' is a flowering plant native to Hawaii, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum oligocephalum lie in its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been utilized in traditional Hawaiian medicine. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. Helichrysum oligocephalum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
